description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, typical of urban residential architecture. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows, with each floor having a consistent pattern of black-framed windows and balconies on the front side. The ground floor includes a recessed entrance area, sheltered by an overhanging canopy, and additional architectural detailing. The building sits on a slightly protruding base, which may serve as a foundation or platform. The exterior is primarily a light gray color, contrasted by black window frames and balcony railings. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, mid-rise apartment building with a flat roof, symmetrical black-framed windows, and balconies on the front facade. The structure is light gray with a prominent base and a recessed entrance.
description_view_0: The rear of the building, showing a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the protruding base.
description_view_1: A side view displaying a vertical row of evenly spaced windows, with no balconies visible.
description_view_2: The front facade, featuring symmetrical windows, balconies, and a recessed main entrance beneath an overhang.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring the window arrangement of view 1, with no balconies or entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each side, with consistent spacing and alignment across all floors. The front facade features grouped windows with balconies, while the sides have single rows of evenly spaced windows.
